mapper.select: select g.id as "groupId", g.group_code as "groupCode", g.group_name as "groupName" from groups g where g.owner_user_id = #{userId} and g.status = 'ACTIVE' order by g.id

select g.id as "groupId", g.group_code as "groupCode", g.group_name as "groupName" from group_memberships gm inner join groups g on g.id = gm.group_id where gm.user_id = #{userId} and gm.role = 'MEMBER' and g.status = 'ACTIVE' order by g.id

select gi.id as "invitationId", gi.group_id as "groupId", g.group_name as "groupName", gi.inviter_user_id as "inviterUserId", u.display_name as "inviterDisplayName", gi.status as "status" from group_invitations gi inner join groups g on g.id = gi.group_id inner join users u on u.id = gi.inviter_user_id where gi.invitee_user_id = #{inviteeUserId} and gi.status = 'PENDING' and g.status = 'ACTIVE' order by gi.id

insert into groups ( group_code, group_name, description, owner_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{groupCode}, #{groupName}, #{description}, #{ownerUserId}, #{status}, now(), now() ) returning id
mapper.insert: insert into group_memberships ( group_id, user_id, role, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role}, now(), now() )
insert into group_invitations ( group_id, inviter_user_id, invitee_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{groupId}, #{inviterUserId}, #{inviteeUserId}, #{status}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: insert into group_invitations ( group_id, inviter_user_id, invitee_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{groupId}, #{inviterUserId}, #{inviteeUserId}, #{status}, now(), now() ) returning id

select gi.id as "invitationId", gi.group_id as "groupId", gi.inviter_user_id as "inviterUserId", gi.invitee_user_id as "inviteeUserId", gi.status as "status" from group_invitations gi inner join groups g on g.id = gi.group_id where gi.id = #{invitationId} and g.status = 'ACTIVE'

select u.id as "userId", u.user_code as "userCode", u.display_name as "displayName", gm.role as "role" from group_memberships gm inner join users u on u.id = gm.user_id inner join groups g on g.id = gm.group_id where gm.group_id = #{groupId} and g.status = 'ACTIVE' order by case when gm.role = 'OWNER' then 0 else 1 end, gm.id
